titleStmt.title: SII 27.216: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 216. (A.R. No. 336 of 1931-32.) KEÑJŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab standing near the Mēla-maṭha at the hamlet Ammañji.

This record states that when Baṅkidēva of Dattāḷvasa-baḷi mahāpradhāna Sōhaṇṇa-sēnabōva, Narasiṅga-heggaḍe, Bammu-sēnabōva, kumāra Bijjaṇṇa-arasa, mahāpradhāna Poruna-senabōva, the dēśi-purushas and the Hundred of Śivapura had assembled in the hiriya-aramane of Bārahakanyāpura, in the presence of the Queen, it was resolved that Kēśava-seṭṭi of the Baṅga family should make a gift of 32 muḍe of paddy out of the dēvasva of Amaje at Karuvakkunda, endowed by Kittihaṭṭuḍeya, to god Mūḍadēva of Śivapura. The queen described as paṭṭada-hiriyarasi is stated to have belonged to the family of Mānābharaṇēśvaradēva.
It is dated Śaka 1200, Vishu, Tulā 7, Sunday, the tithi corresponding to 1281 A.D., October 4, when the weekday was Saturday. This Śaka year was 1203.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīmatu śrīmanmānābharaṇēśvara dēvara vaṁśānve
yaruṁ paścima samudrādhipatiyaruṁ śrīmatu paṭṭadahi
riyarasi ballamahādēviyaru vijayarājya vuttarōtta
rāgi pravarddhamāna Ācaṁdrārkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamirdda sa
kha varuṣa 1200 raneya viṣusaṁvatsarada tolāyalu bra
haspatiyidda tolāmāsa . 7 . neya Ādivāradaṁdu
bārahakaṁnyāpurada hiriyaramaneyalu baha
ḷa goṁdaḷāsthānaṁ berasi sthirasiṁhāsanārū
ḍharāgi vaḍḍōlagaṁ goṭṭiralu śrīpādasaṁni
dhānadalu dattāḷvara baḷiya baṁkidēvanuṁ Uḍu
gara baḷiya narasiṁgaheggaḍeyu mahāpradhāna sōma
ṁṇa sēnabōvanuṁ baṁmu sēnabhōvanu kumāra bijja
ṁṇa Arasaruṁ mahāpradāna peruṇa sēnabhōvanuṁ
dēśipuruṣaru śivapurada grāmada . 100 . rbbaruṁ
koḍirddu barayisida kramaveṁtaṁdaḍe śivapu
rada mūḍadēvaru Udayageydaṁdu kittihaṭṭuḍe
yaru māḍida dharma karuvakuṁdadalu Amajina
dēvassa Ettida Agaḷu Ikida kalliṁda Oḷagaṇa bhū
miya mēle dēvarige mūgaṁḍugadalu bhattamūḍe 32
salisi baṁgarabaḷiya kēsavaseṭṭi bāḷuvudu kōṭīsarase
ṭṭige varuṣake Āsaḍiya habba ka 1 hāneya kke sugi
ya kaṁbaḷake 2 Ettu karadu bahadu malu toḷahaṁge
Āsaḍiya habbake 1 hāne tupa sugiya kaṁbaḷake 2 Etu
radu bahudu Adallade teṟilla beḍuṁgoḷilla basegeyilla
dukhavilla yella Anyōnyamāvudu villa Iṁtappuda
ke dō mu ruvāḍiya ṁdavāgide bari
ya mūḍa
kiḍisidava ga
ṁge vāraṇāsiyali sāvirakavileya yi sida pāpa
Digital edition of SII 27.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
